faqs.question: Can I learn to skydive here?
faqs.answer: AFF (Accelerated Freefall) is coming Spring 2026. Register your interest via the contact form and we will be in touch as soon as it opens.

faqs.question: Can I book a tandem jump?
faqs.answer: Tandem skydiving is coming Spring 2026. Register your interest via the contact form.

faqs.question: I am a licensed jumper. How do I jump here?
faqs.answer: Join the Facebook Messenger community group, coordinate with the crew, and show up on jump day. Tickets are NZ$65 per jump from 12,000ft.

faqs.question: What sport events do you run?
faqs.answer: Canopy coaching, freefly coaching, and demo jumps. Join the Messenger group for upcoming sessions.

faqs.question: How do I find out who is jumping this weekend?
faqs.answer: Join the Facebook Messenger group. That is where all jump day coordination happens.
